title: conscious-deviation entry (Agent Atelier)
description: The schema for one entry in specs/deviation_log.md (PRD §18.4.4). When the tool's actual layout/convention differs from a contract's assumption, or a spec artifact is changed mid-build, the agent CONFORMS to ground truth and records it here — never silently. Deviations are part of the audit surface (§14.5): conscious and visible. This schema mirrors the Markdown entry format used in deviation_log.md so the log stays machine-checkable.

scope.description: the contract id this arose in (e.g. P1-B), or "handoff" for build-scaffolding decisions

ground_truth.description: what was actually found in the tool, or why the change was needed

why.description: the rationale (§18.4.4 names 'why' among the four fields to record); optional here because the deviation_log.md format folds reason into ground_truth

files_touched.description: repo-relative paths changed by this decision
